rule_metadata.name: JekyllGitHub
rule_metadata.author: Dylan Katz (@Plazmaz)
rule_metadata.description: Jekyll Token for GitHub (Created as part of PasteHunter)

rules.rule_text:
rule JekyllGitHub
{
	meta:
		author = "Dylan Katz (@Plazmaz)"
		description = "Jekyll Token for GitHub (Created as part of PasteHunter)"
		reference = "https://github.com/techgaun/github-dorks"
		date = "09/15/19"

	strings:
		$ = "JEKYLL_GITHUB_TOKEN" nocase

	condition:
		all of them
}
